channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Google’s AI-powered workspace is now available to more users in Search
item.description: Google is bringing Canvas to everyone in the US using AI Mode in Search. The feature opens up a dedicated workspace within its AI-powered search tool, allowing it to use the latest information from Search to organize plans, develop tools, and draft documents in a panel alongside your chat. Though Google initially launched Canvas inside […]

item.title: Google ends is 30 percent app store fee and welcomes third-party app stores
item.description: Google is officially doing away with its 30 percent cut of Play Store transactions, and rolling out changes to how third-party app stores and alternate billing systems will be handled by Android. Some of these tweaks were proposed as part of the settlement the company reached with Epic in November 2025, but rather than wait for final judicial approval, Google is committing to revamping Android and the Play Store publicly.The biggest change is to how Google will collect fees from developers publishing apps on Android. Rather than take its standard 30 percent cut of in-app purchases through the ...

item.title: Google’s Gemini rolls out Canvas in AI mode to all US users
item.description: Canvas in AI Mode is available to U.S. users in English for creating plans, projects, apps, and more.

item.title: ‘Corporate Murder’: Even Trump’s Former AI Advisor Thinks the Pentagon’s Fight Against Anthropic Is Bad
item.description: "The machinery of our current republic seems to be in such disrepair that it is hard to see how it lasts," writes Dean Ball.

item.title: Humble Games' former bosses buy the studio's back catalog
item.description: Humble Games' library has returned home, so to speak. Indie publisher Good Games Group (GGG), led by former Humble leaders, has acquired the full back catalog of over 50 Humble Games titles from Ziff Davis. Alongside the purchase, GGG has rebranded to Balor Games, positioning itself as a force in "triple-I" gaming."For the developers we have worked with over the years, this moment is a reunion," Balor Games CEO Alan Patmore wrote in a statement. "[It has] the same leadership and the same commitment to thoughtful publishing remain in place. What changes is our scale and our focus. Balor Games i...

item.title: Niu se lance dans le vélo électrique avec le fatbike NIU BQi Utility 200, doté d’une grosse autonomie
item.description: La marque chinoise Niu se lance enfin sur le créneau du vélo avec le fatbike électrique NIU BQi Utility 200, tout équipé, orienté confort et avec un prix sous les 2 000 euros.

item.title: Decagon completes first tender offer at $4.5B valuation
item.description: The AI-powered customer support startup is the latest example of a fast-growing, young company that's providing employee liquidity.

item.title: This 5.1 Soundbar Bundle Is $100 Off
item.description: Sony's upgraded Bravia Theater System 6 packs a complete home audio setup into a single box.

item.title: Samsung rend l’OLED géant enfin accessible avec cette baisse de 40 % sur ce TV de 77 pouces
item.description: La série S85F de chez Samsung représente l'entrée de gamme des téléviseurs OLED de la marque. En ce moment, sa version 77 pouces s'affiche à un prix bien plus avantageux : 1 352 euros contre 2 290 euros de base.

item.title: Don’t Put Away Those Winter Coats—Another Arctic Blast Is On the Way
item.description: The Eastern U.S. is finally enjoying some springlike warmth, but meteorologists say temperatures could plummet again in mid-to-late March.

item.title: Google isn’t waiting for a settlement — the 30 percent Android app store fee is dead
item.description: In November, Epic and Google jointly proposed a settlement that would change Android's fate globally without cracking open Google's Android monopoly quite the way it otherwise might. Today, Google has decided it's not waiting for that settlement to be approved: it's moving forward with many of its proposed changes right now. By June 30th, Google […]...

item.title: MacBook Neo Hands-On: The Dawn of the True ‘Budget’ Laptop
item.description: It's running on a mobile chip, but it's the screen and sound that may be MacBook Neo's best qualities.

item.title: 7 features the MacBook Neo is missing — from display downgrades to connectivity caveats
item.description: We've got a good look at what the new budget MacBook is packing — but what about the stuff that's missing?

item.title: Pixar’s Down Streak Was Just a Myth
item.description: io9 breaks down the last several years of Pixar releases to prove the animation studio is still crushing it.

item.title: 'An incredibly impressive piece of engineering' — TechRadar's MWC Awards 2026 presents our 12 winners, from cutting-edge phones and tablets, to Wi-Fi and smart security
item.description: Elite products to pay attention to from the Barcelona show.

item.title: Apple’s new MacBook Neo is its cheapest, most colorful laptop so far — here’s how it compares to the Pro and Air
item.description: Apple just unveiled its affordable MacBook Neo model, but how does it stack up against other MacBooks price-wise?

item.title: ‘Musclezempic’ Could Be the Future of Weight Loss
item.description: New trial results highlight the potential of pairing GLP-1 therapy with muscle-boosting drugs.

item.title: Cet écran PC gaming HP 24″ QHD 240 Hz tombe à moins de 200 €, son prix le plus bas, l’occasion idéale pour changer de matériel
item.description: Pour les joueurs PC en quête d'un nouvel écran de qualité, Amazon fait une vente flash sur le HP Omen 27qs, un écran gaming très fluide qui passe de 510 euros à 199,99 euros.

item.title: 'Apple's gonna sell these by the boatload': why the new MacBook Neo is already the most important product of 2026
item.description: The MacBook Neo arrives as a budget-laptop-busting portable that starts at just $599 ($499 for the education market) and rewrites the rules for a budget laptop.

item.title: M5 MacBook Air Hands-On: All of the Changes Are Under the Hood
item.description: If it ain't broke, don't fix it.

item.title: Here are the 6 best Google Pixel 10 upgrades coming in the next Pixel Drop update
item.description: Google has announced the features coming in its next Pixel Drop, and you're in for a treat.

item.title: On sait déjà (presque) tout des Samsung Galaxy A57 et A37
item.description: Il ne manquait plus que les fiches techniques des Galaxy A37 et A57 pour tout savoir sur les futurs smartphones haut de gamme de Samsung. C'est désormais chose faite.

item.title: Save your money and don't buy the iPad Air M4 —get the iPad Air M3 for a record-low price at Amazon
item.description: Thanks to the release of the iPad Air M4, Amazon has the powerful 11-inch iPad Air M3 on sale for its lowest price ever, making it a better value.

item.title: Downdetector and Speedtest sold to Accenture for $1.2 billion
item.description: Downdetector and Speedtest - the free platforms that allow people on the web to quickly check internet speeds or see if an online platform may be down - will soon have a new owner. On Tuesday, the consulting and IT services provider Accenture announced that it has agreed to acquire the Ookla-owned platforms from Ziff […]

item.title: 6 things Apple announced at its big March event — the full list, from the iPhone 17e to the MacBook Neo
item.description: We're still trying to take in everything Apple has announced this week — here are all the details on all the products.

item.title: Google Pixel 10a review: Small changes, but still great value
item.description: Over the past few years, Google's A-series Pixel phones have consistently been some of the best midrange phones you can buy. But with the AI boom causing memory shortages and the price of consumer electronics to rise, including smartphones, affordable devices like the Pixel 10a are more important than ever. Thankfully, Google's new phone still represents great value, even if it doesn't come with many upgrades. Design and display As before, the Pixel 10a has a 6.3-inch 120Hz P-OLED display. Igor Bonifacic for EngadgetThe story of the Pixel 10a is one of small changes, so let’s start with the ou...

item.title: Polymarket Decides Incentivizing a Nuclear Detonation Might Be a Bad Idea
item.description: The prediction market platform recenlty pulled trades on the probablibly of a nuclear weapon being denotated.

item.title: The US military is still using Claude — but defense-tech clients are fleeing
item.description: As the U.S. continues its aerial attack on Iran, Anthropic models are being used for many targeting decisions.

item.title: 'The total industrialization of cyber threats': Cloudflare report outlines how hackers are 'weaponizing the Internet'
item.description: There is a "fundamental rewiring of the modern cyberattack" going on and AI is at the center.

item.title: Nucléaire ou solaire : quelle énergie a vraiment porté la France en 2025 ?
item.description: L’Hexagone est en bonne voie dans sa transition électrique. En 2025, plus de 95 % de l’électricité produite en France est d’origine décarbonée, tandis que les énergies fossiles poursuivent leur chute.

item.title: UPerfect’s $120 portable monitor is a big-screen dream: For commuters and multitaskers who need extra screen space, the 18.5-inch 120Hz IPS display is an easy recommendation
item.description: UPerfect’s 18.5-inch portable monitor with a 120Hz 1080p IPS display and FreeSync support is now just $120 at Newegg.

item.title: NordVPN’s Android feature now warns Europeans about scam calls before they answer
item.description: NordVPN’s Call Protection feature now warns Android users across Europe, the US, the UK, Canada, Japan, and Australia about potential scam calls before they pick up

item.title: 'Highly adjustable, remarkably comfortable': Autonomous ErgoChair Pro is the office chair we return to over and over, and it's $100 off
item.description: Autonomous ErgoChair Pro has all the comfort features I look for in a high-end ergonomic chair, including adjustable headrest, armrests and lumbar support.

item.title: Whatever This Is, We’ve Never Seen Anything Like It
item.description: Blacklisting Anthropic feels like a peek at an uncertain future.

item.title: Elon Musk to testify in Twitter shareholder trial accusing him of deflating stock before $44 billion purchase
item.description: The billionaire Tesla CEO reached a deal to buy Twitter and take it private in April 2022. Elon Musk is expected to take the stand in a shareholder trial on Wednesday in San Francisco, where he’s accused of making false and misleading statements that drove down Twitter’s stock price before he bought the social media platform for $44 billion in 2022....

item.title: Des montres connectées bien plus intelligentes et autonomes grâce à la nouvelle puce Snapdragon Wear Elite
item.description: Lors du MWC de Barcelone, Qualcomm a levé le voile sur sa nouvelle puce pour montres connectées, le Snapdragon Wear Elite. De quoi proposer des montres aux performances accrues tout en intégrant des cœurs dédiés à l'IA.

item.title: Honor’s Robot Phone is a bad robot, an interesting camera, and maybe your friend
item.description: After over four months of teasing, I've finally been able to see Honor's Robot Phone in action. And after all that, it looks pretty legit - just so long as you weren't actually expecting a robot. The Robot Phone could more accurately be called the Gimbal Phone, though I suspect the company's marketing department would […]

item.title: Meilleur aspirateur robot 2026 : quel modèle choisir ?
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d'un bon aspirateur robot pour vous simplifier la vie? Voici notre sélection des meilleurs robots aspirateurs, tous testés et approuvés.

item.title: Comparatif MacBook Neo, Air M2, M4 et M5 : le guide pour ne pas se tromper
item.description: Vous rêviez d'un MacBook neuf sous la barre des 700 € ? Apple l'a fait avec le MacBook Neo. Équipé d'une puce d'iPhone, cet ultraportable promet l'essentiel.

item.title: ‘A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms’ Season 2 Just Cast Some Major Players
item.description: Lucy Boynton, Babou Ceesay, and Peter Mullan have come aboard the 'Game of Thrones' spin-off as characters book readers know very well.

item.title: Google Pixel 10a Review: One Lazy Refresh
item.description: Google really phoned it in with its latest Pixel A-series phone.

item.title: Google Pixel 10a Review: Sensible Value
item.description: It may not offer much new, but the Pixel 10a remains one of the best smartphones in the US for under $500.

item.title: I reviewed the ‘world’s first’ Dolby Atmos FlexConnect soundbar ‘system’ and it’s really something — here’s what I made of LG’s multi-box Sound Suite
item.description: I finally tried a soundbar system with Dolby Atmos FlexConnect, and to say it impressed me would be an understatement.

item.title: ‘It’s by design’: the LG G6 OLED TV’s colors aren’t as punchy as the G5's in its best picture mode — and that’s on purpose, says LG
item.description: Seeing a new OLED not look as bold next to its predecessor can be jarring, but with the LG G6, it appears to be intentional.

item.title: The MacBook Neo is Apple’s take on the Nike Dunk
item.description: Apple’s $599 laptop is a supply-chain triumph wrapped in nostalgic candy colors, but it fails to deliver the ‘new’ its name demands. Apple’s new 13-inch laptop, the MacBook Neo, is a cheap MacBook in the era of expensive PCs, when AI’s endless appetite for memory has caused the price of computers to skyrocket.

item.title: Review: The $499 Pixel 10a does something Samsung and Apple cant
item.description: Google's newest A-series Pixel phone is a lot like the previous generation, and the generation before that, and the generation before...

item.title: How to watch Real Sociedad vs. Athletic Bilbao in the Copa del Rey online for free
item.description: How to watch Copa del Rey for free. Live stream Real Sociedad vs. Athletic Bilbao in the Copa del Rey for free.

item.title: Mon test du Pixel 10a, ou quand Google fait du neuf avec du vieux
item.description: Nouveau fleuron de milieu de gamme de Google, le Pixel 10a rabote son module photo, mais ne change aucun de ses composants, ou presque. Et pourtant, il a été amélioré.

item.title: Well, there goes any reason to buy an iPad Air
item.description: Apple just announced the MacBook Neo, a 13-inch laptop offering the full macOS experience for just $599. It is the machine, I’m sure, plenty of the company’s fans have been clamoring for since the dawn of the netbook. I’m equally sure its specs have enough drawbacks to ensure there are still plenty of customers for the more expensive Macbooks; the same cannot be said of the iPad Air. If you’re looking for a machine that you can actually use meaningfully, the Neo has the Air beat. It has two USB-C ports, 16-hour battery life, a real keyboard, trackpad and the ability to run macOS with proper m...
